chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 292 of 2026 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 1324/26. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Jam Zeshan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for Respondent (SRB) Mr. Kalash A. Vaswani, AAG. ---------- Learned counsel in attendance jointly invite attention to the Order made by a learned Division Bench of this Court on 12.08.2024 in C.P No. D-3383 of 2024 and submit that this Petition may also be disposed in similar terms. So ordered. The petition accordingly stands disposed of in light of the aforementioned Order, which shall apply mutatis mutandis to the matter at hand. Judge Judge Ayaz
